sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45380" key="eu)upa/nthtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐυπάντητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily approached</tr_>, Dumont-Homolle <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Mélanges d'Archéologie</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:459" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">459</biblScope> </bibl> (Apollonia in Thrace).</sense> </entryFree>
